text_original: 震，亨。震來虩虩，笑言啞啞。震驚百里，不喪匕鬯。
text_normalized: 震，亨。震來虩虩，笑言啞啞。震驚百里，不喪匕鬯。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=Judgment.

text_original: 初九：震來虩虩，后笑言啞啞，吉。
text_normalized: 初九：震來虩虩，后笑言啞啞，吉。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=first.

text_original: 六二：震來厲，億喪貝，躋于九陵，勿逐，七日得。
text_normalized: 六二：震來厲，億喪貝，躋于九陵，勿逐，七日得。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=second.
Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=third.
Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=fourth.

text_original: 六五：震往來厲，億无喪，有事。
text_normalized: 六五：震往來厲，億无喪，有事。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=fifth.

text_original: 上六：震索索，視矍矍，征凶。震不于其躬，于其鄰，无咎。婚媾有言。
text_normalized: 上六：震索索，視矍矍，征凶。震不于其躬，于其鄰，无咎。婚媾有言。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=top.
